title: WE Learn B1U5 Our Earth 翻译练习

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】我们应当勇敢地承担起对地球的责任。
options: We should bravely accept our responsible for the earth.
We should bravely take our responsibility for the earth.
questions.correct_answer: B. We should bravely take our responsibility for the earth.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】地球日让人们更关注环境问题。
options: The Earth Day draws more attention to environmental problems.
The Earth Day makes people close attention to environmental issues.
questions.correct_answer: A. The Earth Day draws more attention to environmental problems.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】全球许多地标建筑响应“地球一小时”的号召，在每年3月最后一个星期六熄灯一小时。
options: To answer "Earth Hour", many landmark buildings around the world turning off lights one hour on the last Saturday of every March.
Many global landmark buildings respond to the call of "Earth Hour" by switching off lights one hour on the last Saturday of every March.
questions.correct_answer: B. Many global landmark buildings respond to the call of "Earth Hour" by switching off lights one hour on the last Saturday of every March.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】绿水青山就是金山银山。
options: Green waters and mountains are golden mountains and silver mountains.
Clear waters and green mountains are as valuable as mountains of gold and silver.
questions.correct_answer: B. Clear waters and green mountains are as valuable as mountains of gold and silver.

questions.title: 【B1U5 Our Earth · 中译英】走向生态文明新时代，建设美丽中国，是实现中华民族伟大复兴的中国梦的重要内容。
options: Walk to a new ecological civilization, build a beautiful China and realize the Chinese great rejuvenation are the important parts of the Chinese dream.
Moving towards a new era of ecological civilization and building a beautiful China is an important part of realizing the Chinese dream of the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation.
questions.correct_answer: B. Moving towards a new era of ecological civilization and building a beautiful China is an important part of realizing the Chinese dream of the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation.

questions.title:
【B1U5 Our Earth · 英译中】

Earth Hour started in 2007 in Sydney, Australia when 2.2 million people and more than 2,000 businesses turned their lights off for one hour to take a stand against climate change. Only a year later Earth Hour had become a global movement with more than 50 million people from 35 countries. Global landmarks such as the Sydney Harbour Bridge, CN Tower in Toronto, Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco, and Rome's Colosseum, all stood in darkness, as symbols of hope for a cause that grows more urgent by the hour.
questions.correct_answer: “地球一小时”始于2007年澳大利亚悉尼，220万人、2,000多家企业熄灯一个小时，表达了反对气候变化的立场。仅仅一年之后，“地球一小时”就成了全球性的活动，有35个国家5千多万人参加。许多全球地标性建筑——如悉尼海港大桥、多伦多国家电视塔、旧金山金门大桥、罗马斗兽场——都屹立在黑暗中，成为对这项日益迫切的事业的希望的象征。
